# terrible_vultr_cloud_instance (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `label` (String) Name of the instance.
- `region` (String) Region the instance is deployed into.

### Optional

- `activation_email` (Boolean) Whether to send an activation email when the instance is ready or not. Only considered on creation.
- `app` (String) The app deploy name of Vultr OneClick apps. Mutually exclusive with *image* and *os*.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `backups` (Boolean) Whether to enable automatic backups or not.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `ddos_protection` (Boolean) Whether to enable ddos_protection or not.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `enable_ipv6` (Boolean) Whether to enable IPv6 or not.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `firewall_group` (String) The firewall group description to assign this instance to.
- `hostname` (String) The hostname to assign to this instance.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `image` (String) The image deploy name of Vultr Marketplace apps. Mutually exclusive with *os* and *app*.
- `os` (String) The operating system name. Mutually exclusive with *image* and *app*.
- `plan` (String) The plan name to use for the instance. Required if the instance does not yet exist.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `reserved_ipv4` (String) IP address of the floating IP to use as the main IP of this instance. Only considered on creation.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `skip_wait` (Boolean) Whether to skip the wait for the instance to be completely ready for access.
- `snapshot` (String) Description or ID of the snapshot. Only considered while creating the instance.
- `ssh_keys` (String) List of SSH key names passed to the instance on creation.
- `startup_script` (String) Name or ID of the startup script to execute on boot. Only considered while creating the instance.
- `state` (String) State of the instance. The state *reinstalled* was added in version 1.8.0.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `user_data` (String) User data to be passed to the instance.
- `user_scheme` (String) The user scheme used as login user (Linux-only). By default, the *root* user is configured. Only considered while creating the instance.
- `vpcs` (String) A list of VPCs identified by their description to be assigned to the instance.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `vultr_api` (String) Response from Vultr API with a few additions/modification.
- `vultr_instance` (String) Response from Vultr API.
